name: 5G SA Coverage Obligation Proof
trigger: Regulator requests evidence of 5G SA population coverage meeting licence condition of 80% by end of year.

autonomyLevels.L1: Engineering team compiles drive test and active probe data into regulatory submission.
autonomyLevels.L2: Automated coverage report generation from continuous test data.
autonomyLevels.L3: Real-time compliance dashboard with regulator portal access.
autonomyLevels.L4: Continuous automated compliance evidence. Regulator access to live data. No submission cycle required.

economicOutcome: Licence condition compliance demonstrated. Spectrum licence protected. Fine risk eliminated.
economicCalculation: 5G spectrum licence value: €500M–€2B. Coverage obligation breach risk: licence review, fines, or revocation. Continuous testing cost: <0.1% of licence value.
combinationUpgrade: Drive test (Keysight Nemo) provides geographically precise outdoor coverage evidence. Active probes (EXFO Evolver) provide continuous indoor and network-wide service quality evidence. Together they address both coverage and quality dimensions of most licence conditions.
